sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for Genesis port

special_mechanics.name: Double Jump
special_mechanics.description: Every character can perform a double jump, a unique feature of the Power Instinct series

special_mechanics.name: Run and Attack
special_mechanics.description: All characters have the ability to attack while running

special_mechanics.name: Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Several characters can change their appearance and fighting style by executing certain moves, usually throwing moves

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides game mechanics overview but lacks precise physics parameters. No documented gravity, jump velocity, acceleration, or sub-pixel system data available for the Genesis port. Movement mechanics described qualitatively through gameplay features (double jump, run attacks, transformations) rather than numerical values.
